summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Fase 3 modularization validation. All tested features are working: Login, Router navigation (Mapa/Ver Stock/Relatórios), Registrar Inseminação page, and Relatórios period filter. DATABASE_URL is active and connection pool established successfully.

login.details: Login with admin/admin123 works correctly, user level 'Administrador' displayed

router_mapa.details: Mapa dos Contentores loads as default page, shows CT-TEMP contentor with 0 palhetas, toolbar with 'Adicionar contentor' and 'Editar mapa' buttons

router_ver_stock.details: Ver Stock page loads correctly via sidebar navigation, shows 'Estoque Atual' header with 'Nenhum stock cadastrado' message

router_relatorios.details: Relatórios page loads correctly with ZONA DE SELEÇÃO (Garanhão/Proprietário/Contentor/Histórico Geral), ZONA DE FILTROS, ZONA DE RESULTADOS

registrar_inseminacao.details: Registrar Inseminação page loads correctly via sidebar navigation, shows 'Nenhum lote disponível para inseminação' message

relatorios_period_filter.details: Period filter in Relatórios works correctly - 'Aplicar período' checkbox toggles Data início and Data fim date inputs (YYYY/MM/DD format)

database_url_active.details: Pool created with DATABASE_URL (sslmode=require) - confirmed via logs: '✅ Pool criado com DATABASE_URL (sslmode=require)'

critical_code_review_comments: Fase 3 modularization VERIFIED - all page modules delegated correctly via router
DATABASE_URL configuration is active and working with Render PostgreSQL
No visual/functional regressions detected in tested flows
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fase 3 modularization fully validated. All router pages (Mapa, Ver Stock, Relatórios) working. DATABASE_URL active. Period filter in Relatórios functional. No stock data in DB currently - pages show appropriate empty state messages.
rca_of_issue: No issues found. All tested features working correctly.
